mapper.sql: id, resource_id, type, title, translator_name, author_name, cover_url, summary, pub_date, isbn, publisher, price, page_count, doi, journal, source_origin, source_url, source_score, user_score, user_score_count, final_score, sentiment_score, has_graph, view_count, comment_count, star_count, ctime, mtime, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource ( resource_id, type, title, translator_name, author_name, cover_url, summary, pub_date, isbn, publisher, price, page_count, doi, journal, source_origin, source_url, source_score, sentiment_score, view_count, comment_count, star_count, ctime, mtime, deleted ) VALUES ( #{resourceId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{translatorName}, #{authorName}, #{coverUrl}, #{summary}, #{pubDate}, #{isbn}, #{publisher}, #{price}, #{pageCount}, #{doi}, #{journal}, #{sourceOrigin}, #{sourceUrl}, #{sourceScore}, #{sentimentScore}, #{viewCount}, #{commentCount}, #{starCount}, #{ctime}, #{mtime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE resource SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND comment_count > 0
UPDATE resource SET star_count = star_count - 1 WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND star_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.id, r.resource_id, r.type, r.title, r.translator_name, r.author_name, r.cover_url, r.summary, r.pub_date, r.isbn, r.publisher, r.price, r.page_count, r.doi, r.journal, r.source_origin, r.source_url, r.source_score, r.user_score, r.user_score_count, r.final_score, r.sentiment_score, r.has_graph, r.view_count, r.comment_count, r.star_count, r.ctime, r.mtime, r.deleted FROM resource r INNER JOIN resource_author_rel rel ON r.resource_id = rel.resource_id WHERE rel.author_id = #{authorId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.pub_date DESC, r.ctime DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE resource SET user_score = #{userScore}, user_score_count = #{userScoreCount}, final_score = CASE -- 两个评分都有：动态权重计算 -- 用户评分权重 = min(0.7, 评分人数 / 150) -- 豆瓣评分权重 = 1 - 用户评分权重 WHEN source_score > 0 AND #{userScore} > 0 THEN ROUND( source_score * (1 - LEAST(0.7, #{userScoreCount} / 150.0)) + #{userScore} * LEAST(0.7, #{userScoreCount} / 150.0), 1 ) -- 只有豆瓣评分 WHEN source_score > 0 AND #{userScore} = 0 THEN source_score -- 只有用户评分 WHEN (source_score = 0 OR source_score IS NULL) AND #{userScore} > 0 THEN #{userScore} -- 都没有 ELSE 0 END WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM resource WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, graph_id, resource_id, graph_json, generate_status, error_message, ai_model, token_usage, generate_time, ctime, mtime, deleted FROM resource_character_graph WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource_character_graph ( graph_id, resource_id, graph_json, generate_status, error_message, ai_model, token_usage, generate_time, ctime, mtime, deleted ) VALUES ( #{graphId}, #{resourceId}, #{graphJson}, #{generateStatus}, #{errorMessage}, #{aiModel}, #{tokenUsage}, #{generateTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
